scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,AI,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "blue,magenta,cyan" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:ai" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:ai: dotenv -e .env -- sh -c 'cd ai-service && source venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null || true && uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${AI_SERVICE_PORT:-8000} --reload'
scripts.start: concurrently --names "BACKEND,AI,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "blue,magenta,cyan" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:ai" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.start:ai: dotenv -e .env -- sh -c 'cd ai-service && source venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null || true && uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${AI_SERVICE_PORT:-8000}'
